svg.title: KinTrain AWS architecture
svg.desc: Source-code-based KinTrain AWS architecture diagram using official AWS architecture icons.
svg.text: KinTrain アプリケーション AWS アーキテクチャ
Source code based: Amplify Gen 2 / React SPA / REST Lambda APIs / Bedrock AgentCore AI coach
Amplify branch-scoped backend. DynamoDB tables are PAY_PER_REQUEST with PITR; destructive removals retain data stores.

g.text: private user and AI-coach avatar images
signed GET URLs and delete via Lambda
GSIs for order, lookup, and history

svg.text: Key source files: amplify/backend.ts, amplify/auth/resource.ts, frontend/src/api/coreApi.ts, frontend/src/api/aiRuntimeApi.ts, amplify/agentcore/runtime/main.py, amplify/functions/*/handler.ts
README.md was not used as source of truth. AgentCore resources are conditional in code; current amplify_outputs.json shows enabled=true.
